pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Framework 6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and is incompatible with Spring Framework 6 APIs required by modern libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 17 to match the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Java 11 will cause compilation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade OpenAPI/Swagger version to 2.6.0 to support Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version 1.x of springdoc-openapi is incompatible with Spring Boot 3/Spring Framework 6.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor conflicts.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct and Lombok annotation processors may conflict, leading to missing getter/setter methods in generated code at compile time.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from commons-lang3 to inherit from Spring Boot BOM.
Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'springdoc-openapi-ui' does not exist in version 2.x; the new starter artifact is required for Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The annotation @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity was removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity DSL from chained builder methods to lambda-based configuration required by Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The old chained API methods (e.g., .cors().and(), .authorizeRequests().antMatchers()) were removed in Spring Security 6; code fails to compile.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Add import for Customizer.withDefaults to support the new lambda-based security configuration.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The symbol withDefaults is used in the new configuration but was not imported, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Remove import for the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity annotation.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The class EnableGlobalMethodSecurity no longer exists in Spring Security 6, causing a compile error if imported.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Add import for the new @EnableMethodSecurity annotation.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The class EnableMethodSecurity is used in the new configuration but was not imported, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate validation API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile error (package not found) on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate validation API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes a compile-time error (package not found) on Java 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Java 17/Spring Boot 3 environments where Jakarta EE namespaces are mandatory.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta EE 9+ namespace.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Compilation failure: the class javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest does not exist in the Jakarta EE 9+ environment used by Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta EE 9+ namespace.
src/main/java/design/boilerplate/springb.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.servlet does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments used by Spring Boot 3.
